step_types.name: agent
step_types.description: Agent dispatch with injectable dispatchFn, template compilation, output path resolution

step_types.name: gate
step_types.description: Async gate execution with process groups, onPass/onFail handling

step_types.name: transform
step_types.description: Pure expression mapping: no LLM invocation, resolves mapping fields via ${{ }}

step_types.name: loop
step_types.description: Loop iteration with accumulated evidence, receives dispatchAgent callback, onExhausted handling

step_types.name: pause
step_types.description: Pause step: returns completed immediately, executor sets status=paused

step_types.name: forEach
step_types.description: forEach iteration: resolves array, binds element via as, adds forEach.index/length to scope, collects outputs

step_types.name: command
step_types.description: Shell command execution: sh -c, captures stdout as JSON or text, fails on non-zero exit

agent_specs.name: plan-decomposer
agent_specs.description: Renders phase spec + architecture + conventions into planning prompt via Nunjucks, produces plan-breakdown JSON

agent_specs.name: spec-implementer
agent_specs.description: Renders individual plan into implementation prompt, produces execution-results JSON

agent_specs.name: verifier
agent_specs.description: Verifier agent with typed verifier-output schema (truths, criteria_results, artifacts, gaps, human_verification)

schemas.name: plan-breakdown
schemas.description: Plan decomposition output with plans[], parallel groups

schemas.name: execution-results
schemas.description: What agents produce: tasks, decisions, issues, deviations

schemas.name: verifier-output
schemas.description: Verification result: truths, artifacts, requirements_coverage, criteria_results, gaps, human_verification

schemas.name: audit
schemas.description: Audit output: checks, findings with severity/location/fix, summary

schemas.name: conformance-reference
schemas.description: Conformance rules: principles, rules with check_method/patterns/severity

demo_workflows.name: typed-analysis
demo_workflows.description: 5 YAML agent specs, 4 JSON schemas, Nunjucks task templates rendering from typed data
demo_workflows.proves: YAML spec → template composition → typed JSON output → template-rendered task prompt → agent working from structured data

demo_workflows.name: self-implement
demo_workflows.proves: project blocks → template composition → plan decomposition → forEach execution → verification → typed results
